issues.description: First ability trigger is wrong. Text says '[Opponent's Turn] If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect' — this is a conditional replacement effect, not OnAttacked. Should use Counter trigger with appropriate condition, not OnAttacked.

First ability action is incomplete. Text allows resting 1 card instead of removal, but DSL only has Rest without specifying the replacement/prevention mechanic. The effect prevents removal entirely by resting a card — not a simple Rest action.
First ability condition is wrong. Should check if opponent is taking a turn action that removes this Character, not just 'Always'. Needs condition reflecting 'opponent's effect would remove this'.

Second ability duration is wrong. Text says 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' — duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Violation of duration rule for opponent turn effects.
Second ability action incomplete. Should cost 2 rests (Rest action with amount 2 to Self/Leader), but DSL missing rest cost declaration.
